ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., TE, WR) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is currently associated with */,
  "current_fantasy_pts" REAL /* Current total fantasy points scored */,
  "player_birthday" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Player's weight */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "player_injury_status" TEXT /* Player's injury status (e.g., healthy, injured, questionable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "total_fantasy_pts" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored by the team */,
  "team_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the team */,
  "team_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "team_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "team_ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the team */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the league */,
  "team_roster_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team's roster */,
  "team_bench_size" INTEGER /* Number of players on the bench */,
  "team_starting_roster" TEXT /* Current starting roster of the team (as a JSON array of player IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy league */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the league */,
  "scoring_format" TEXT /* Scoring format used in the league (e.g., PPR, Standard) */,
  "league_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "league_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., public, private) */,
  "league_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the league */,
  "league_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the league */,
  "league_status" TEXT /* Current status of the league (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "user_avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of stats */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the season */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions made by the player */,
  "fantasy_pts" REAL /* Fantasy points scored during the week */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game played */,
  "player_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "player_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "player_passes_caught" INTEGER /* Number of passes caught by the player */,
  "player_passes_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of passes thrown by the player */,
  "player_interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "player_sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the player */,
  "player_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "player_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  "player_fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost by the player */,
  "player_kickoff_returns" INTEGER /* Number of kickoff returns by the player */,
  "player_punt_returns" INTEGER /* Number of punt returns by the player */,
  "player_field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "player_field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "team_id_giver" INTEGER /* ID of the team giving the player */,
  "team_id_receiver" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the player */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade occurred */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "trade_request_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was requested */,
  "trade_accept_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was accepted */,
  "trade_reject_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was rejected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_receiver FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_receiver") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_giver FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_giver") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance dip, injury news) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Custom message for the alert */,
  "alert_triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "live_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the update is for */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., score, injury) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the update */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "update_source" TEXT /* Source of the update (e.g., official stats, news feed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_live_updates_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "total_receptions" INTEGER /* Total receptions recorded in the report period */,
  "total_fantasy_pts" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored in the report period */,
  "report_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "report_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, season) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Additional details of the report (as a JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, player, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "team_member_role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team (e.g., owner, co-owner, member) */,
  "team_member_status" TEXT /* Status of the team member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
